calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Gerard Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff, B.D. Thakor
Lisa Rodriguiz aka Lisa Foreman, Defendant in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case settled on the record.
Stipulated Judgment was read into the record as follows.
Judgment in favor of Plaintiff for rent in the amount of $3,275.00.
Restitution and Possession of premises to Plaintiff located at: 1018 Mission Street #414, S.F., CA by 9 am 5/5/04.
Writ of Possession stayed until 9am 5/5/04 if Defendant pays $1,200 for back rent and $600 for May rent by 9am 5/5/04. Plaintif will cancel eviction if agreed amount is paid by 9am 5/5/04.
Written Stipulated Judgment will be submitted by Plaintiff's counsel. Jury trial vacated.

JPT: Steven McDonald (304B) Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
